perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women are standing in front of a shelf filled with snacks in a supermarket, one wearing a blue dress and the other wearing a striped dress and a hat. (2) They pick up hexagonal boxes of Koala's March cookies, showcasing the pineapple and mango flavors with smiling expressions. (3) The scene cuts to a close-up of a blue 'Soda Float' flavored box and then two boxes of 'Matcha' flavored cookies, held by the women. (4) The video concludes with a wide shot of the shelf packed with the hexagonal cookie boxes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music starts playing immediately. (2) Two female voices are heard speaking rapidly and enthusiastically in Mandarin, describing the different snack flavors. (3) The soundscape is dominated by the energetic dialogue and the background music, with faint ambient noise from the store environment. (4) The audio maintains a consistent high-energy tone until the clip ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: '小熊餅乾控 不要錯過這裡' (Koala cookie fans, don't miss this) appears in bold yellow and purple letters. (2) Functional: Subtitles appear at the bottom translating the speech about flavors like '鳳梨的 pineapple', '芒果的' (Mango), and '漂浮汽水的' (Soda Float). (3) Decorative/Hook: '你會買哪一款？ 留言告訴我哦' (Which one would you buy? Tell me in the comments) appears at the end with a fiery emoji effect.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Showcase -> Close-up Highlights -> Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female presenters appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One female with long black hair in a dark blue ruffled dress; another female wearing a straw hat and a white-and-blue striped off-the-shoulder dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A densely packed retail shelf with various snack brands, primarily yellow Lotte Koala's March boxes and Japanese signage. A Don Don Donki mascot is visible on the top signage.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and review a variety of Lotte Koala's March cookie flavors found at a retail store, aiming to excite fans of the snack and drive engagement through a question about flavor preference.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is centered around showcasing specific products from Lotte and recommending the shopping location.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy dual-host presentation style with variety-show style text graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media influencer editing techniques, including fast cuts and vibrant overlays, to maintain high viewer retention.
